mapper.select:
select count(*) from product where
id like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
entp_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
item_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
efcy_qes like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

select p.*, IF(EXISTS(select * from user_bookmark_product ubp where ubp.product_id = p.id and ubp.user_id = #{userId}), true, false) as is_bookmark from product p where
id like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
entp_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
item_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
efcy_qes like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
-- order by is_bookmark desc, p.item_name limit #{recordSize} offset #{offset}
